title: Hybrid-Grid LinUCB Scheduler — Code + Theory + Paper + Thesis Report Completion
context: User requested Ralph mode until everything is done: code (M3 LinUCB + HEFT baseline + statistical reps), theory (research-backed citations), benchmark vs baseline, English paper draft, and Vietnamese thesis report. Evidence-based throughout — no speculation.

stories.title: ε-greedy benchmark completes and findings extracted
acceptanceCriteria: tasks-epsilon-greedy.jsonl saved under .sisyphus/evidence/m1/
benchmark-epsilon-greedy-results.txt saved under .sisyphus/evidence/m1/
findings.md updated with ε-greedy column in wall-clock and load-balance tables
Q-value distribution and exploration ratio analysis added to findings.md

stories.title: Implement LinUCB scheduler (Go code)
acceptanceCriteria: internal/coordinator/scheduler/linucb.go implements LinUCBScheduler with per-arm A and b matrices
Sherman-Morrison update keeps cost O(d²) per RecordOutcome (verified by code inspection)
Feature vector construction matches paper-skeleton.md §3.3 (12 features)
Implements LearningScheduler interface; SelectWithDispatchInfo populates Q value as θᵀx
All math verified against Li et al. 2010 §3.2 algorithm description (cite specific equation numbers in code comments)
Uses gonum/mat for numerical linear algebra (no hand-rolled matrix ops)
Unit tests (≥6) cover: argmax UCB selection, A and b updates, cold start, concurrent safety, feature normalization, regret-decreasing trend on synthetic data

stories.title: Wire LinUCB into factory, CLI, log schema
acceptanceCriteria: newScheduler factory accepts "linucb" type
--alpha CLI flag added to hg-coord serve, validated to (0, 10]
Config gains AlphaValue float64 field with default 1.0 (Li 2010 §3.2 prescription)
Compile() feedback hook supplies feature vector via TaskContext
Integration test verifies LinUCB choice path produces valid log records
go build clean and go test -race ./internal/coordinator/... pass

stories.title: Run LinUCB benchmark and append to findings
acceptanceCriteria: tasks-linucb.jsonl saved with ≥800 records under .sisyphus/evidence/
Wall-clock numbers added to findings.md table for 1w/3w/5w configs
Per-worker dispatch ratio computed and reported
P50/P95/P99 compile_time_ms reported
Q value learning curve over time included in evidence (CSV or PNG)

stories.title: Theoretical research depth — subagent-driven
acceptanceCriteria: Subagent (document-specialist) produces research note covering: LinUCB regret bound under non-stationarity (Lattimore & Szepesvári 2020 ch.19), reward-shaping pitfalls (Ng et al. 1999), and bandits-vs-MDP framing for our problem
docs/thesis/theory-notes.md written with citations to peer-reviewed sources only (DOI required for each)
Each citation independently verified by a second subagent (general-purpose) returning either a confirmation or a correction
No claim in theory-notes.md lacks an inline citation

stories.title: HEFT baseline implementation (offline-style, adapted to online)
acceptanceCriteria: internal/coordinator/scheduler/heft.go implements an online adaptation of Topcuoglu et al. 2002 HEFT (DOI 10.1109/71.993206)
Code comments cite specific paper sections for each design decision (insertion-based, EFT, rank function — or document deviation)
Wired into factory + CLI as --scheduler=heft
≥4 unit tests covering: candidate ranking, insertion logic when slot conflicts, fallback behaviour, concurrency
Build clean + race tests pass

stories.title: Run HEFT benchmark and add to comparison
acceptanceCriteria: tasks-heft.jsonl + benchmark-heft-results.txt saved under .sisyphus/evidence/
findings.md updated with HEFT column
Comparison narrative explains where HEFT is competitive and where the bandit methods exceed it

stories.title: Paper full draft — sections §3 Method, §5 Evaluation, §6 Discussion
acceptanceCriteria: paper-skeleton.md sections §3.2-§3.4 fully expanded with prose and equations (no placeholders)
§5.2-§5.4 tables filled with all four scheduler columns (LeastLoaded, P2C, ε-greedy, LinUCB) and HEFT row added
§5.5 ablation section drafted with at least 3 ablation studies described and one executed
§6 Discussion drafted (≥1 page)
All citations have DOI or ArXiv ID

stories.title: Vietnamese thesis report — full chapter draft for scheduling
acceptanceCriteria: docs/thesis/chuong-X-lap-lich.md written (≥6 pages, formal academic Vietnamese)
Sections: bài toán → phương pháp → triển khai → đánh giá → thảo luận
Referenced as a chapter that the supervisor (GVHD) can review
Numerical results from .sisyphus/evidence/ embedded as tables

stories.title: Statistical significance — multi-repetition runs
acceptanceCriteria: Each scheduler benchmark run ≥5 times on the 5w-hetero config
Mean ± standard deviation reported in findings.md and paper §5.2
Paired statistical test (Wilcoxon signed-rank) computed for LinUCB vs P2C and reported with p-value

stories.title: Final commit/push and reviewer sign-off
acceptanceCriteria: All changes committed using conventional commit format
Pushed to origin/main
go build clean, go test -race ./... pass (excluding known-flaky Docker integration)
Reviewer (architect or critic) approves the implementation against acceptance criteria
